bootstrap_ssh_private_key.description: SSH private key used by repo automation for host and guest access.

hetzner_dns_api_token.name: HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN
hetzner_dns_api_token.description: Hetzner DNS API token for DNS publication and ACME DNS-plugin automation.

proxmox_api_token_payload.description: Durable Proxmox API token secret returned once and persisted locally.

monitoring_proxmox_writer_token.description: Mirrored local token used for Proxmox metric-server configuration.

monitoring_guest_writer_token.description: Mirrored local token used by guest observability paths that ship Telegraf metrics into InfluxDB.

ntfy_alertmanager_password.description: Controller-local password used by Alertmanager and ntfy clients for the private platform-alerts topic.

backup_vm_api_user_password.description: Local password material for the PBS automation user created during backup VM convergence.

backup_vm_api_token_payload.description: Local PBS API token payload used by host-side backup automation.

proxmox_dr_offsite_password.name: PROXMOX_DR_OFFSITE_PASSWORD
proxmox_dr_offsite_password.description: Password for the optional off-site CIFS target used to store the backup-lv3 VM copy for ADR 0100 host-loss recovery.

control_plane_recovery_runtime_ssh_priva.description: Controller-local SSH private key installed on docker-runtime-lv3 so scheduled control-plane backups can push archives into backup-lv3 without reusing a human credential.

control_plane_recovery_controller_bundle.description: Controller-local bundle of recovery references mirrored to backup-lv3 for control-plane restore and break-glass drills.

proxmox_ops_pam_totp_state.description: Controller-local TOTP state for the routine Proxmox admin identity.

tailscale_api_key.name: TAILSCALE_API_KEY
tailscale_api_key.description: Tailnet admin API token used for ADR 0108 Tailscale invitation and device-removal actions.

tailscale_tailnet.name: TAILSCALE_TAILNET
tailscale_tailnet.description: Tailnet identifier used when ADR 0108 provisions Tailscale invites or removes devices from the live operator workflow path.

tailscale_invite_endpoint.name: LV3_TAILSCALE_INVITE_ENDPOINT
tailscale_invite_endpoint.description: Optional ADR 0108 Tailscale invite API endpoint template mirrored into Windmill for browser-first onboarding.

headscale_api_key.description: Controller-local Headscale API key used for governed administrative automation against the mesh control plane.

mattermost_webhook_url.name: LV3_MATTERMOST_WEBHOOK
mattermost_webhook_url.description: Mattermost incoming webhook used for ADR 0108 onboarding, offboarding, and quarterly review summaries.

step_ca_ssh_register_command.name: LV3_STEP_CA_SSH_REGISTER_COMMAND
step_ca_ssh_register_command.description: Optional command template mirrored into Windmill so ADR 0108 can register SSH principals through the approved step-ca wrapper.

step_ca_ssh_revoke_command.name: LV3_STEP_CA_SSH_REVOKE_COMMAND
step_ca_ssh_revoke_command.description: Optional command template mirrored into Windmill so ADR 0108 can revoke SSH principals through the approved step-ca wrapper during offboarding.

uptime_kuma_admin_session.description: Durable local Uptime Kuma admin session material for repo-managed monitor changes.

uptime_robot_api_key.description: Controller-local Uptime Robot API key used for independent public status monitoring automation.

uptime_robot_mattermost_webhook.description: Mattermost incoming-webhook URL used by Uptime Robot alert-contact automation.

ansible_galaxy_server_token.name: ANSIBLE_GALAXY_SERVER_TOKEN
ansible_galaxy_server_token.description: Internal Galaxy server token used to publish the lv3.platform collection artifact.

portainer_admin_password.description: Controller-local Portainer bootstrap password for the private runtime console on docker-runtime-lv3.

portainer_admin_auth.description: Controller-local Portainer auth material including the private controller URL, admin username, and endpoint id used by the governed Portainer wrapper.

vaultwarden_database_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Vaultwarden PostgreSQL password for the private credential-vault runtime.

vaultwarden_admin_token.description: Controller-local Vaultwarden admin token used for the bounded admin bootstrap and invite path.

vaultwarden_admin_token_hash.description: Controller-local Vaultwarden admin token hash mirrored for deterministic, idempotent runtime renders.

mail_platform_brevo_api_key.description: Brevo transactional email API key used by the mail gateway send path.

mail_platform_admin_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Stalwart admin password used for managed mail bootstrap and verification.

mail_platform_server_mailbox_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the server@lv3.org mailbox password used for managed mail verification and recovery.

mail_platform_metrics_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Stalwart metrics password used by managed observability automation.

mail_platform_gateway_admin_api_key.description: Controller-local admin API key for mail gateway CRUD, profile listing, and state inspection.

mail_platform_operator_alerts_mailbox_pa.description: Controller-local mailbox password for the operator-alerts sender profile.

mail_platform_operator_alerts_gateway_ap.description: Controller-local scoped mail gateway API key for the operator-alerts notification profile.

mail_platform_platform_transactional_mai.description: Controller-local mailbox password for the platform-transactional sender profile.

mail_platform_platform_transactional_gat.description: Controller-local scoped mail gateway API key for the platform-transactional notification profile.

mail_platform_agent_reports_mailbox_pass.description: Controller-local mailbox password for the agent-reports sender profile.

mail_platform_agent_reports_gateway_api_.description: Controller-local scoped mail gateway API key for the agent-reports notification profile.

step_ca_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the private step-ca password used to unlock the CA runtime keys for backup and recovery workflows.

step_ca_humans_provisioner_password.description: Controller-local password for the humans JWK provisioner used to request short-lived operator SSH certificates.

step_ca_agents_provisioner_password.description: Controller-local password for the agents JWK provisioner used by approved automation to request short-lived credentials.

step_ca_services_provisioner_password.description: Controller-local password for the services JWK provisioner used for internal TLS issuance tests and future private service certificates.

step_ca_hosts_provisioner_password.description: Controller-local password for the hosts JWK provisioner used to issue SSH host certificates to the Proxmox host and managed guests.

netbox_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the NetBox database role on postgres-lv3.

netbox_superuser_password.description: Locally mirrored NetBox bootstrap superuser password used for recovery and initial operator access.

netbox_api_token.description: Locally mirrored NetBox bootstrap API token used for repo-managed inventory synchronization.

gitea_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the Gitea database role on postgres-lv3.

gitea_admin_password.description: Controller-local bootstrap password for the private Gitea admin identity.

gitea_webhook_secret.description: Controller-local webhook secret mirrored for repo-managed Gitea webhook registration and verification workflows.

gitea_runner_registration_token.description: Controller-local registration token mirrored from Gitea for the dedicated act_runner on docker-build-lv3.

gitea_renovate_token.description: Controller-local token for the repo-managed renovate-bot identity used by the internal Gitea Actions dependency update workflow.

n8n_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the n8n database role on postgres-lv3.

n8n_owner_password.description: Controller-local bootstrap password for the n8n owner account used for initial sign-in verification and recovery.

n8n_encryption_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the n8n encryption key used for credential and execution-secret continuity.

windmill_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the Windmill database role on postgres-lv3.

windmill_superadmin_secret.description: Locally mirrored Windmill bootstrap superadmin secret used for repo-managed verification and script sync.

mattermost_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the Mattermost database role on postgres-lv3.

mattermost_admin_password.description: Controller-local bootstrap password for the Mattermost ops admin identity.

mattermost_incoming_webhooks.description: Controller-local manifest of repo-managed Mattermost incoming webhook URLs for alert, workflow, approval, handoff, and mail channels.

keycloak_database_password.description: Locally mirrored PostgreSQL password for the Keycloak database role on postgres-lv3.

keycloak_bootstrap_admin_password.description: Controller-local password for the Keycloak master-realm bootstrap admin retained as the SSO break-glass recovery path and used for ADR 0108 operator lifecycle automation.

keycloak_operator_password.description: Controller-local bootstrap password for the named Keycloak operator account before TOTP enrollment and later rotation.

keycloak_grafana_client_secret.description: Controller-local OIDC client secret used to wire Grafana through the shared Keycloak broker.

keycloak_ops_portal_client_secret.description: Controller-local OIDC client secret used by the ops portal auth proxy to delegate browser login to Keycloak.

keycloak_agent_client_secret.description: Controller-local confidential client secret for the approved LV3 agent client-credentials path.

keycloak_langfuse_client_secret.description: Controller-local OIDC client secret used by Langfuse to delegate browser sign-in to the shared Keycloak broker.

langfuse_database_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the PostgreSQL password for the Langfuse database role on postgres-lv3.

langfuse_nextauth_secret.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse NextAuth secret used for stable session signing across re-converges.

langfuse_salt.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse API key salt used to keep bootstrap credential generation stable.

langfuse_encryption_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse application encryption key for sensitive runtime payloads.

langfuse_clickhouse_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse ClickHouse password used by the web and worker services.

langfuse_redis_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse Redis password used for runtime queueing and cache state.

langfuse_minio_root_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the Langfuse MinIO root password used for local event and media object storage.

langfuse_bootstrap_user_password.description: Controller-local bootstrap password for the Langfuse break-glass user retained for live verification and recovery.

langfuse_project_public_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the repo-managed Langfuse project public key for approved agent ingestion clients.

langfuse_project_secret_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the repo-managed Langfuse project secret key for trace ingestion and verification.

langfuse_project_id.description: Controller-local mirror of the repo-managed Langfuse bootstrap project id used by smoke verification and future agent clients.

ops_portal_oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret.description: Controller-local cookie secret mirrored for the ops portal oauth2-proxy so browser sessions survive re-converges without invalidation drift.

open_webui_admin_password.description: Controller-local mirror of the bootstrap Open WebUI admin password for private operator sign-in and live verification.

open_webui_secret_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the Open WebUI persistent secret key used for session and secret encryption continuity.

open_webui_provider_env.description: Optional controller-local provider configuration used to pin approved model connectors for Open WebUI.

searxng_secret_key.description: Controller-local mirror of the SearXNG persistent secret key so re-converges keep session signing and limiter state stable.

platform_context_api_token.description: Controller-local bearer token for the private platform context API and OpenAPI tool server.

open_webui_oidc_client_secret.description: Optional controller-local OIDC client secret for switching Open WebUI from local auth to Keycloak-backed SSO later.

openbao_init_payload.description: Controller-local OpenBao init payload containing the bootstrap root token and unseal key shares for recovery, re-converge operations, and ADR 0108 operator entity synchronization.

openbao_ops_password.description: Controller-local password for the named OpenBao ops userpass identity used for routine administration.

openbao_breakglass_password.description: Controller-local password for the OpenBao break-glass userpass identity with full emergency privileges.

openbao_postgres_rotator_password.description: Controller-local password mirrored for the PostgreSQL admin role that OpenBao uses to mint dynamic database credentials.

openbao_controller_approle.description: Controller-local AppRole artifact for scoped controller automation access to OpenBao secrets, Transit, and dynamic PostgreSQL credentials.

openbao_mail_platform_approle.description: Controller-local AppRole artifact for the mail-platform service identity to read scoped mail runtime secrets and use Transit operations.

mattermost_platform_findings_webhook_url.description: Optional incoming-webhook URL used by ADR 0071 to post non-ok findings into the Mattermost #platform-findings channel.

glitchtip_platform_findings_event_url.description: Optional ADR 0071 event ingestion endpoint used to forward non-ok findings into a GlitchTip-compatible bridge.

nats_jetstream_admin_password.description: Controller-local password for the private NATS JetStream admin principal currently used by ADR 0080 maintenance-window queries and bucket management.

semaphore_database_password.description: Controller-local PostgreSQL password for the Semaphore database role on postgres-lv3.
